Extension Status

Credential Request Tests

Select a test scenario to request credentials via the Digital Credentials API.

Basic Identity

Request name claims from an identity credential.

Age Verification

Request age_over_18 with value matching.

Full Profile

Request multiple claims: name, email, address.

Multiple Credentials

Request from multiple credential types.
